prompt: I need to add real-time notifications to my Next.js app. Users should get notified when someone comments on their post, when they get a new follower, and when their post gets liked. I'm using Prisma with PostgreSQL and the app is deployed on Vercel. I was thinking SSE or WebSockets but I'm not sure which is better for Vercel's serverless setup. Can you forge a spec for this?
assertions: At least one round of interactive questions is asked to the user (not rhetorical)
The agent pauses/stops after asking questions, waiting for user input before proceeding
No SPEC.md file is created yet (interview comes before spec writing)
No application code (components, API routes, etc.) is written
